summary: Added 7 typed integration API namespace objects (QuickBooks, Xero, Sage Intacct, Salesforce, Workday, Bill.com, EDI) to apps/web/src/lib/api.ts, plus shared types (AccountMapping, SyncResult, OAuthConnectResponse). Created test file with 16 passing tests covering method existence and URL path correctness.
decisions_made: Sage Intacct connect is POST (credentials-based) while others use GET (OAuth)
EDI partner CRUD uses unknown types since no specific types were specified
Bill.com has payment-specific methods (payBill, payBulk) unique to that integration
next_steps: Refactor integrations page to consume these new namespace objects instead of hardcoded URLs
